description: Remove personal information (PI) from system notes, workflow history, and field values to comply with privacy regulations (right to be forgotten).

methods.name: createTask
methods.description: Creates a personal information removal task.

params.name: options.recordIds
params.description: Internal IDs of the records to process

params.name: options.fieldIds
params.description: Field IDs whose values should be removed

params.name: options.workflowIds
params.description: Workflow IDs whose history should be removed

params.name: options.historyOnly
params.description: If true, only removes system notes, not field values or workflow history

params.name: options.historyReplacement
params.description: Text to replace original values in system notes

methods.name: deleteTask
methods.description: Deletes a personal information removal task.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The ID of the task to delete

methods.name: getTaskStatus
methods.description: Retrieves the status of a personal information removal task.

methods.name: loadTask
methods.description: Loads an existing personal information removal task.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The ID of the task to load

objectTypes.name: PiRemovalTask
objectTypes.description: Represents a personal information removal task.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the personal information removal task.

properties.name: recordType
properties.description: The record type updated by the PI removal task.

properties.name: recordIds
properties.description: The record IDs processed by the PI removal task.

properties.name: fieldIds
properties.description: The field IDs processed by the PI removal task.

properties.name: workflowIds
properties.description: The workflow IDs whose history is processed by the PI removal task.

properties.name: historyOnly
properties.description: Indicates whether the PI removal task removes system note information only, not field values or workflow history.

properties.name: historyReplacement
properties.description: The text used in system notes to replace the original values.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Describes the status of the submitted personal information removal task.

objectTypes.name: PiRemovalTaskLogItem
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a log item of the personal information removal task status.

properties.name: exception
properties.description: Describes the exception for the log item, including what caused it.

properties.name: message
properties.description: Describes the message for the log item and an explanation for any errors.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Describes the status of the log item. Values from task.TaskStatus.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Describes the type of personal information removed: FieldValue, SystemNote, or Workflow.

objectTypes.name: PiRemovalTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates the status of a personal information removal task.

properties.name: logList
properties.description: A list of logs for the PI removal task job.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Describes the status of the submitted personal information removal task.
